name: LiveRamp Holdings, Inc.
business: LiveRamp sells a data collaboration platform for marketers and media owners to unify data and power marketing performance. It serves a global customer base including brands, agencies, and technology providers across many industries.

exposures.sentence: Our platform is engineered for AI agent accessibility, facilitating autonomous data collaboration between the specialized AI agents utilized by our customers and partners and our networked platform.

the possibility that we may experience failures or breaches of our network and data security systems, leading to potential adverse publicity, negative customer reaction, or liability to third parties;
The foundation for commerce media is data collaboration where companies share first-party consumer data with trusted business partners in a manner that is secure and adheres to privacy regulations.

catalysts.sentence: The Merger is expected to close by the end of calendar year 2026, subject to customary closing conditions, including approval by the Company’s stockholders and the receipt of required regulatory approvals.

catalysts.event: Increase headcount by ~200 in Q2 fiscal 2027 due to workforce strategy
catalysts.sentence: Consequently, our employee headcount will increase by approximately 200 in the second quarter of fiscal 2027.
